In order to move on to the next portion of setting up our click funnel, we're going to need to sign up for Acuity, because we're going to place a scheduler inside of the click funnel. So, if you click on the button right below this video, you'll be able to sign up. I'm going to go to the window here just because otherwise it will sign me in to my other account. So, once you click on that button, it's going to bring you to acuityscheduling.com, and you're going to click on Try It Now. Once you've done that, it's going to ask for your email. And a password. Please write down your password or use a password reminder system. I'm 5 p.m. 7 p.m. From there, you'll just go ahead and go all the way through and set your regular availability. If you have a day that you are taking off, maybe you're going on vacation, it's the 4th of July, or something like that, then you're going to come down here where it says override specific hours for specific days. So, if you scroll down here, you can see that it's taken some of my hours. So, if I wanted to be off on the 19th, I could override my regular hours by deleting the hours in there. And then I could either change my availability to something different for that day specifically or I can type in closed. And for that day specifically, it'll show that I'm closed. When we set up our appointments, we are going to want to set up our default limits. So that is this area up here. So we're going to go ahead and click on Edit Default Limits. This area right here, do not allow clients to schedule fewer than. X hours in advance. X hours in advance. So, what you're going to put right here is how long of a notice you will need in order to show up to your gym in order to make an appointment. So if you're at your gym all the time during your availability, this should probably be zero. If for some had that you would just type in the number. So from here, we're going to save our changes. And the next thing that we need to do is change our appointment type. So acuity is kind enough to set us up with an example appointment type, but it's not the kind of appointment that we need. So the next thing that we're going to do is click on the Home button here. And we're going to scroll down to appointment types. So you can add in your different appointment types in here, but we're going to edit this one for now. So I'm going to go ahead and click on the Edit button here. I like the name consultation, but you could change it to orientation or whatever you'd like. We suggest you set your sales appointments up for 30 minutes. And then our sales appointments are free. So we are going to remove the price. From here, you'll scroll all the way down and you'll update the appointment type. If you wanted to add in a different appointment, you would just hit new type of service. You would name the service. How long it is. So let's make a weigh in. As we will need those. Those should take about 15 minutes. They're free. Public create our appointment type. So you can set up all of your appointment types like that. So from here, now that we have our different appointment types and our calendar set up, we can go ahead and add in the scheduling page. To our ClickFunnel. So we'll be doing that in our next video.
